subcodes.first_line: O teacher! God willing, mayest thou render service, in the realm of heart and soul, at the threshold of the Ancient of Days [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای معلم انشاء الله در جهان دل و جان خدمتی باستان یزدان نماای و در دبستان
subcodes.subjects: @education of children; moral education, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
